itinerary.route: Georgia — Springer Mountain to NC Border
itinerary.mapNote: Section 1/8 · Georgia · Southern terminus Springer Mountain. Blood Mountain 1372m — highest GA point. 78 miles.

itinerary.route: Great Smoky Mountains — Fontana Dam to Davenport Gap
itinerary.overnight: Mount Collins Shelter / Cosby Knob Shelter
itinerary.mapNote: Section 2/8 · GSMNP · Clingmans Dome 2025m — highest point on entire AT. Shelter reservations required. 110 miles.

itinerary.route: Roan Highlands — Davenport Gap to Damascus VA
itinerary.overnight: Roan High Knob Shelter / Damascus hostel
itinerary.mapNote: Section 3/8 · TN/NC border · Roan Mountain balds 1916m. Grassy ridge walks. Damascus — the friendliest trail town. 180 miles.
Section 4/8 · Southern VA · Grayson Highlands wild ponies. Mount Rogers 1746m — highest point in Virginia. 175 miles.

itinerary.overnight: Pickle Branch Shelter / The Home Place area
itinerary.mapNote: Section 5/8 · Central VA · McAfee Knob — most photographed spot on AT. Tinker Cliffs. Dragon's Tooth. The notorious Virginia blues. 170 miles.

itinerary.route: Shenandoah NP — Waynesboro to Front Royal
itinerary.mapNote: Section 6/8 · Shenandoah NP · 105 miles of Skyline Drive ridgeline. Waysides every 20 miles. Deer everywhere. Hawksbill Mountain 1235m.

itinerary.route: Mid-Atlantic — Front Royal to Connecticut Border
itinerary.overnight: Ed Garvey Shelter / Delaware Water Gap / Graymoor
itinerary.mapNote: Section 7/8 · WV / MD / PA / NJ / NY · Harpers Ferry emotional halfway. Pennsylvania Rocksylvania boulder fields. Bear Mountain NY. 430 miles.

itinerary.overnight: Lake of the Clouds Hut / Katahdin Stream Campground
itinerary.mapNote: Section 8/8 · New England · Presidential Range — Mount Washington 1917m. NH Whites most brutal terrain. Maine 100-Mile Wilderness. Katahdin finish. 630 miles.

waypoints.name: Springer Mountain
waypoints.note: Southern terminus. The bronze plaque where every NOBO thru-hike begins.

waypoints.name: Blood Mountain
waypoints.note: Highest point in Georgia on the AT. Rocky exposed summit with stone shelter.

waypoints.name: Clingmans Dome
waypoints.note: Highest point on the entire Appalachian Trail. Concrete observation tower.

waypoints.name: Roan Mountain
waypoints.note: Vast grassy balds above treeline. Rhododendron tunnels in June. Roan High Knob shelter at 1915m.

waypoints.name: Grayson Highlands
waypoints.note: Wild ponies roam the highland plateau freely. One of the AT's most magical landscapes.

waypoints.name: McAfee Knob
waypoints.note: The most photographed location on the entire AT. Iconic overhanging rock ledge.

waypoints.name: Harpers Ferry
waypoints.note: ATC headquarters. Emotional psychological halfway point for NOBO hikers. Historic Civil War town.

waypoints.name: Mount Washington
waypoints.note: Home of the world's worst recorded weather. Lake of the Clouds AMC hut just below summit.

waypoints.name: Katahdin — Baxter Peak
waypoints.note: The northern terminus. The wooden sign. The end of 2,190 miles. Baxter State Park.
